/usr/bin/c++  -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -O1 -Wa,--noexecstack  -Wall -Wextra -Wno-format-truncation -g   -Wl,-z,nodump -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now  -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/indi_regulusfocuser.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/indi_regulusfocuser.dir/indi_regulusfocuser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/indi_regulusfocuser.dir/modbusMaster.cpp.o -o indi_regulusfocuser  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libindidriver.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libindiAlignmentDriver.so -lmodbus
